expectations.text: Provides exactly three subject line options
expectations.evidence: Response provides exactly three numbered subject lines.

expectations.text: Each option takes a genuinely distinct angle and is labeled by angle (e.g. curiosity / benefit+offer / urgency)
expectations.evidence: Options are labeled 'Urgency', 'Direct offer', and 'Personality-led' — each a distinct angle.

expectations.text: Each subject line is under ~50 characters
expectations.evidence: 'Black Friday: [X]% off every subscription, this weekend only' is approximately 60 characters, exceeding the ~50 char limit.

expectations.text: Does not fabricate specific discount figures; flags if a real discount % is needed
expectations.evidence: Uses '[X]%' as a placeholder but provides no explicit note flagging that a real discount figure is needed.
